data: {"generalSituation":"The subtropical ridge will continue to bring very hot weather to inland Guangdong tomorrow. The area of low pressure now over the central and southern parts of the South China Sea will develop into a tropical cyclone. The tropical cyclone is expected to intensify gradually and move in the general direction of the vicinity of Hainan Island and Beibu Wan in the next couple of days. It will be windy and the weather will become unsettled with squally showers and thunderstorms over the coast of southern China. There will be swells. Under the influence of an active southerly airstream, it will still be windy with occasional heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over the coast of Guangdong during the weekend to early next week. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to affect the coast of southern China midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260702","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 4, occasionally force 5 offshore later.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and a few showers.
